import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F


class Model(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, interp_scale_factor, interp_mode, argmax_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.interp_scale_factor = interp_scale_factor
        self.interp_mode = interp_mode
        self.argmax_dim = argmax_dim

    def forward(self, x):
        x = torch.round(x)
        x = F.interpolate(x, scale_factor=self.interp_scale_factor, mode=self.interp_mode)
        x = torch.argmax(x, dim=self.argmax_dim)
        return x


batch_size = 128  # Increased batch size to increase runtime
height, width = 512, 128
in_channels = 3
interp_scale_factor = 2.0
interp_mode = "bilinear"
argmax_dim = 0


def get_inputs():
    return [torch.randn(batch_size, in_channels, height, width)]


def get_init_inputs():
    return [in_channels, interp_scale_factor, interp_mode, argmax_dim]
```

import torch.nn.functional as F


class Model(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, stride, padding, dilation, bias, batch_norm):
        super().__init__()
        self.conv_transpose = nn.ConvTranspose2d(
            in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, stride=stride, padding=padding, dilation=dilation, bias=bias
        )
        self.avg_pool = nn.AvgPool2d(3, stride=1)
        self.batch_norm = nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels) if batch_norm else nn.Identity()

    def forward(self, x):
        x = self.conv_transpose(x)
        x = F.layer_norm(x, x.shape[1:])
        x = self.avg_pool(x)
        x = self.batch_norm(x)
        return x
